testimonials.title: Rated 5 Stars by Toronto Homeowners
testimonials.subtitle: Real reviews from our satisfied customers

review1.text: Ali, is very professional, friendly and reliable. He and his brother are amazing and do not over charge or scam in any way. I recommend them for all your plumbing needs.
review1.author: E Prab

review2.text: Had a great experience with them. All came right on time on a saturday morning, and he quickly fixed 3-4 problems in my apartment unit such as fixing a sliding mirror door, re-installing a door and a few other minor problems. Will highly recommend them.
review2.author: Sogl Nasab

review3.text: I was so fortunate to come across and use Blue Men Plumbing. They were prompt, efficient and did great work. Their quote and final price was lower than I expected. Anyone needing a professional plumber for a small or an extensive large job; they are who to call and you won't be disappointed.
review3.author: Michael Masse

contact.title: Call Now -- We're Available 24/7 Across the GTA

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our plumbing services

q1.question: How much does a plumber cost in Toronto?
q1.answer: Our services range from $85 for basic repairs to $3,000+ for full bathroom rough-ins. We provide free, no-obligation quotes so you know the exact cost before any work begins. No hidden fees.

q2.question: Do you offer free estimates?
q2.answer: Yes. Every quote is free with no obligation. Fill out our online form and we'll get back to you within 24 hours with a detailed estimate, or call us directly at 647-500-7989.

q3.question: Are you available for emergencies on weekends and holidays?
q3.answer: Absolutely. We offer 24/7 emergency plumbing service, including weekends and holidays. Burst pipe at 2 AM on Christmas? We'll be there.

q4.question: What areas do you serve in the GTA?
q4.answer: We serve the entire Greater Toronto Area including Scarborough, North York, Etobicoke, Markham, Mississauga, Brampton, and surrounding communities within a 50 km radius.

q5.question: Are your plumbers licensed and insured?
q5.answer: Yes. All our plumbers are fully licensed and insured in Ontario. We carry comprehensive liability insurance for your peace of mind.

q6.question: Do you offer any warranties on your work?
q6.answer: Yes. All our work comes with a satisfaction guarantee. If you're not happy with the results, we'll make it right at no extra charge.
